title: The Vanity of Dreams
setting: A haunted hotel room 1010 where mirrors show other times. The Hotel Majestic is trapped in a time loop, and only by solving the mirror puzzles can you escape.

characters.name: Mrs. Gable
characters.description: The spectral housekeeper, forever cleaning a room that no longer exists.

characters.name: The Reflection
characters.description: A malevolent presence that lurks in the mirrors, watching and waiting.

items.name: Mirror Shard
items.description: A sharp piece of broken mirror, still gleaming with an eerie silver light.

items.name: Room 1010 Key
items.description: A brass keycard labeled '1010 - ROOM KEY'.

items.name: Maintenance Log
items.description: A logbook with frantic notes about 'the entities in the mirrors' and a warning to stay out of room 1010.

items.name: Circuit Fuse
items.description: A heavy-duty fuse for the elevator's main power circuit.

items.name: Auxiliary Power Cell
items.description: A small battery pack used to jumpstart the elevator's auxiliary systems.

items.name: Elevator Override Key
items.description: An ornate key that manually activates the service elevator's final floor.

scenes.name: Hotel Lobby
scenes.prose: You stand in the grand, decaying lobby of the Hotel Majestic. Dust motes swirl in the faint light of a shattered chandelier. The air smells of mildew and something metallic. A reception desk lies cracked, its ledger torn. A large ornate mirror hangs cracked; shards of glass litter the floor. To the north, a heavy door is boarded up, but the boards are loose.

lookDescriptions.chandelier: Crystal shards dangle, tinkling in the draft.
lookDescriptions.shattered mirror: The mirror is smashed; something about the glass feels alive.

scenes.name: 10th Floor Hallway
scenes.prose: The dim hallway stretches east and west, carpeted in faded red. Neon '1010' glows faintly above a door. A brass keycard glints on the floor. The door to room 1010 is reinforced with a keypad lock.

lookDescriptions.room 1010 door: A heavy steel door with a digital keypad.

scenes.name: Room 1010
scenes.prose: A once-grand suite, now in disarray. The bed is torn, curtains moth-eaten. A writing desk is covered in frantic notes about 'the mirrors'. A maintenance logbook lies open. The door to the service elevator is rusted shut.

lookDescriptions.writing desk: Papers scattered with sketches of eyes watching from mirrors.
lookDescriptions.maintenance log: The final entry reads: 'The entity in room 1010's mirror is not a reflection. It is real.'

scenes.name: Service Elevator
scenes.prose: A cramped, metallic elevator car that smells of ozone. Flickering lights cast long shadows. A control panel with a broken switch. An open fuse box hangs from the wall. Spare parts litter the floor, including a heavy fuse and a small power cell.

lookDescriptions.fuse box: Empty fuse sockets. One is burnt out.
lookDescriptions.control panel: The 'CALL' button is missing its cover.

scenes.name: Boiler Room
scenes.prose: Steam hisses from broken pipes in this cavernous space. A massive boiler dominates the room, its pressure gauge cracked. Heavy chains hang from the ceiling. A door to the north bears an ornate lock. An elevator override key hangs on a hook nearby.

lookDescriptions.boiler: The furnace is cold, but you feel a lingering heat.
lookDescriptions.override hook: A brass hook shaped like a question mark.

scenes.name: Grand Ballroom
scenes.prose: The grand ballroom is frozen in time. Crystal chandeliers dangle, covered in cobwebs. Polished floors reflect ghostly silhouettes waltzing. A massive gilt-framed mirror dominates the far wall, showing not your reflection, but a nightmarish version of the hotel. The air hums with a low frequency. This is the heart of the curse.

lookDescriptions.mirror: The reflection shows you standing in a different era, but the eyes of the entities follow you.
lookDescriptions.chandeliers: The crystals are actually tiny teeth.

puzzles.result: You pry the boards loose with the sharp glass. The door groans open, revealing a darkened hallway beyond.
puzzles.blockedMessage: The north exit is blocked by sturdy boards. You need something to pry them.

puzzles.result: The lock clicks. The door to Room 1010 swings inward with a sigh.
puzzles.blockedMessage: The door to Room 1010 is locked. You need the key.

puzzles.action: use maintenance-log on elevator control panel
puzzles.result: The panel accepts the authorization code from the logbook. The rusted elevator doors grind open.
puzzles.blockedMessage: The elevator door is rusted shut. It requires an authorization code.

puzzles.result: The elevator lights flicker on. A low whine builds as the machinery powers up. The elevator descends to the boiler room level.
puzzles.blockedMessage: The elevator is dead. It needs a fuse and a power source.

puzzles.result: The key turns smoothly. The boiler-room door to the north unlocks with a heavy clunk.
puzzles.blockedMessage: The door to the ballroom is locked with an ornate mechanism. You need the override key.

winCondition.description: As you step into the ballroom, the hotel's timeline collapses. You are thrust out into the night, the building crumbling behind you. You have escaped the Vanity of Dreams.
